description: Pinned input artifact for Top-1 eval regression without live model outputs.
update_rules: Update only through a dedicated eval regression PR.
Recompute sha256 for every changed input file.
Do not commit live model answers into this artifact.
Keep eval reports separate under eval/reports/.

non_pinned_inputs.reason: Generated per run and must be compared by schema, not treated as source input.
Depends on external public corpus state and local download timing.
